title: Agent with unrestricted shell command execution
description: An AI agent has access to shell execution without command restrictions. A compromised agent can execute arbitrary system commands.
remediation: Restrict to an allowlist of safe commands. Use sandboxed execution environments. Implement human approval for destructive operations.

title: Agent with unrestricted filesystem write access
description: An AI agent can write to arbitrary filesystem paths without path restrictions. A compromised agent can overwrite critical files or plant malicious content.
remediation: Restrict write access to a sandboxed directory. Implement path allowlists. Require human approval for writes outside the sandbox.

title: Agent with unrestricted outbound network access
description: An AI agent can make HTTP requests to arbitrary domains. This enables data exfiltration to attacker-controlled servers.
remediation: Implement domain allowlisting for all outbound requests. Log and audit all network activity. Block connections to private/internal networks.

title: Agent can modify its own permissions or tools
description: An AI agent can dynamically add tools or modify its own permissions, enabling self-escalation of capabilities beyond intended scope.
remediation: Tool registration must require admin approval. Agent permissions should be immutable at runtime. Implement least privilege principle.

title: Destructive agent action without human approval gate
description: An AI agent can perform destructive operations (delete files, drop tables, send emails) without requiring human confirmation.
remediation: Implement mandatory human-in-the-loop for all destructive or irreversible actions. Use confirmation gates before execution.

title: Agent tool chain without iteration limits
description: An AI agent can execute tool chains without iteration limits, potentially entering infinite loops that exhaust resources or accumulate unintended side effects.
remediation: Set max_iterations on all agent executors. Implement timeout limits. Add cost budgets for chained LLM calls.
